input: Revenue is flat this month but pipeline is up 40%. Should I be worried or excited?
Generate an executive briefing for a 20-person SaaS company with $80K MRR, 5% monthly churn, and 14 months of runway.
Three things are going wrong simultaneously: churn is spiking, our best engineer quit, and a competitor launched a similar feature. What do I focus on first?
What KPIs should a B2B SaaS company at $1M ARR track weekly?
My team seems overwhelmed but I'm not sure which projects to cut. How do I decide?
